---
title: 'Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness... from around the web.'
date: '2016-06-12T02:41:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Wolfe for Office'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '6713678041997669638'
blogger_filename: '/2016/06/life-liberty-and-pursuit-of-happiness.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Wolfe for Office/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Foundations'
  - 'Platform'
  - '#SocialSharingDay'
  - 'Compassion'
  - 'History'
  - 'Liberty'
  - 'Reason'
---

<h3>
Here are a few things from around the web that inspired me today, or made me think...</h3>
<h4>
#SocialSharingDay: 06/11/16</h4>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/yt3-ggpht-com/photo-7cc78d8cc4aa.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/yt3-ggpht-com/photo-7cc78d8cc4aa.jpg" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<b>WEB EXCLUSIVE: <a href="https://youtu.be/qC2qlLJcwrg" target="_blank">Democrats vs Libertarians</a> |&nbsp;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjo1uN-aM3rmBV46xj7l2KA">John Stossel</a> </b><br />
<br />
<br />
<iframe allowfullscreen="" frameborder="0" height="360" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/qC2qlLJcwrg" width="640"></iframe>

<br />
<blockquote class="twitter-tweet" data-lang="en">
<div dir="ltr" lang="und">
<a href="https://t.co/HNMfg7vklQ">pic.twitter.com/HNMfg7vklQ</a></div>
â€” Gov. Gary Johnson (@GovGaryJohnson) <a href="https://twitter.com/GovGaryJohnson/status/741453800368529411">June 11, 2016</a></blockquote>
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" height="503" scrolling="no" src="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/post.php?href=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fdarrellwolfe%2Fposts%2F10207755592865420&amp;width=500" style="border: none; overflow: hidden;" width="500"></iframe>

<br />
<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li><b><a class="g-profile" href="https://plus.google.com/104104126393959482852" target="_blank">+Gov. Gary Johnson</a>&nbsp; and I&nbsp;only disagree on one point, that is more than I can say for Trump or Clinton.</b></li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" height="436" scrolling="no" src="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/post.php?href=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fdarrellwolfe%2Fposts%2F10207755554824469&amp;width=500" style="border: none; overflow: hidden;" width="500"></iframe>

<br />
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" height="503" scrolling="no" src="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/post.php?href=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fdarrellwolfe%2Fposts%2F10207755539504086&amp;width=500" style="border: none; overflow: hidden;" width="500"></iframe>

<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" height="380" scrolling="no" src="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/post.php?href=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fdarrellwolfe%2Fposts%2F10207755535183978&amp;width=500" style="border: none; overflow: hidden;" width="500"></iframe>

<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" height="405" scrolling="no" src="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/post.php?href=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fdarrellwolfe%2Fposts%2F10207749606395762&amp;width=500" style="border: none; overflow: hidden;" width="500"></iframe>

<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li><b>Enough said: Vote&nbsp;<a class="g-profile" href="https://plus.google.com/104104126393959482852" target="_blank">+Gov. Gary Johnson</a>&nbsp;2016</b></li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" height="405" scrolling="no" src="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/post.php?href=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fdarrellwolfe%2Fposts%2F10207755552224404&amp;width=500" style="border: none; overflow: hidden;" width="500"></iframe>

<br />
<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li><b>When you hear "taxes" think "my money"... Then ask if you are OK with the government taking YOUR money from you, and using YOUR money like this:</b></li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" height="503" scrolling="no" src="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/post.php?href=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fdarrellwolfe%2Fposts%2F10207755551184378&amp;width=500" style="border: none; overflow: hidden;" width="500"></iframe>

<br />
<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li><b>"An ounce of prevention is better than a pound of cure".&nbsp;</b></li>
<li><b>Bad guys who know that they will get shot by their victims are FAR less likely to shoot them.&nbsp;</b></li>
<li><b>Bad guys who know they will not be resisted are encouraged to move ahead with their plan.&nbsp;</b></li>
<li><b>This is basic psychology people... Gun laws are stupid, unless the law protects the rights to have them and use them for self defense and deterrence (anywhere and everywhere, especially elementary schools and planes).</b></li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" height="480" scrolling="no" src="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/post.php?href=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fdarrellwolfe%2Fposts%2F10207755548344307&amp;width=500" style="border: none; overflow: hidden;" width="500"></iframe>

<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" height="501" scrolling="no" src="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/post.php?href=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fdarrellwolfe%2Fposts%2F10207755542464160&amp;width=500" style="border: none; overflow: hidden;" width="500"></iframe>

<br />
<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li><b>The only reason you and your kids are being strapped into College Debt, is because the government backs it with your tax dollars.&nbsp;</b></li>
<li><b>If there were no government guarantees for debt, banks would lend responsibly.&nbsp;</b></li>
<li><b>As a result, costs would go down.&nbsp;</b></li>
<li><b>Surprise, you could pay cash if costs went down.</b></li>
<li><b>But I have no degree (dropped out but still have debt). I work with, and make more than, many people who have degrees. So what did that degree get them?</b></li>
<li><b>Then there's this thought below:</b></li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" height="378" scrolling="no" src="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/post.php?href=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fdarrellwolfe%2Fposts%2F10207755545864245&amp;width=500" style="border: none; overflow: hidden;" width="500"></iframe>

<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" height="502" scrolling="no" src="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/post.php?href=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fdarrellwolfe%2Fposts%2F10207755540744117&amp;width=500" style="border: none; overflow: hidden;" width="500"></iframe><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
<b>Hope you enjoyed, please share your favorite posts, comments, and things around around the web.&nbsp;</b></h4>
<b><br /></b>
<b>Darrell</b>
